zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Grey於大約1455年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，他的父親Sir John Grey24歲，母親Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England19歲。他於1470年10月與Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset在英國肯特格林維其結婚。他去世於1501年9月20日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年47歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Grey于大约1455年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，他的父亲Sir John Grey24岁，母亲Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England19岁。他于1470年10月与Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset在英国肯特格林維其结婚。他去世于1501年9月20日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾斯利享年47岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾艾斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Grey was born about 1455, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Grey, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, was 19. He married Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset in October 1470, in Greenwich, Kent, England. He died on 20 September 1501, in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Astley, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Grey est né environ 1455, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Grey, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset en octobre 1470, à Greenwich, Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1501, à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Astley, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.Saint Albans, Hertfordshire, England: St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Grey um 1455 in Groby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Grey 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England 19. Er hat im Oktober 1470 in Greenwich, Kent, England Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset geheiratet. Er starb am 20. September 1501 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Astley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Astley, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grey è nato il circa 1455 nel Groby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Grey, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset nel ottobre 1470, nel Greenwich, Kent, England. Morì il 20 settembre 1501, nel Astley, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Astley, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Greyが約1455年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父Sir John Greyは24歳，母Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of Englandは19歳であった。1470年10月にイギリスケントグレエンウィチでLady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorsetと結婚した。彼は1501年9月20日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーで47歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアアストリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grey(이)가 대략 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Grey(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1470년 10월 영국 켄트 그린위치에서 Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1501년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 애스틀리에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 애스틀리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1455, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Grey, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset em outubro de 1470, em Greenwich, Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1501, em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Astley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Grey родился около 1455 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Grey было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Woodville Queen Consort of England, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Holland Marchioness of Dorset октябрь 1470 г. в местности гринвич, кэнт, Англия. Он умер 20 сентября 1501 г. в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности астли, варвиккшир, Англия.
